title: Simply Gems - Topaz
description: Add Topaz, Ore, Tools & Armor to your minecraft experience!
body:
![Brief Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f369e86b5b63b6ce129c74e5bee73410c1acf162.png)

Adds Topaz, Ore, Armor & Tools to your minecraft experience!

Hardness: 7.5 Resistance: 15

Spawns at 24 to 44 and -44 to -1

5 new tools, 1 new armor set, 2 topaz ore variants.

1.01 Update coming: changes will include, proper tools settings to pickaxe to get drop, sword damage. Update 1.01 released!
